ops.text: The capt-hook hook dispatcher (`uvx --isolated capt-hook run <Event>` in the plugin's hooks.json) hard-bricks an entire Claude Code session when the network is down: every PreToolUse dispatch tries to resolve https://pypi.org/simple/capt-hook/, DNS failure makes the hook error, and a failing PreToolUse hook blocks the tool call — so NO tool (Read, Bash, MCP, even ToolSearch) can run. Observed live 2026-07-20: ~30 min DNS outage = ~60 consecutive blocked tool calls, plus the Stop hook failing the same way and bouncing every turn-end back as feedback. uv should be able to serve capt-hook from its cache offline (or the dispatcher should fail open on infra errors vs policy denials). Design call for the framework owner.
